```text
1	// Stock out router — tenant-scoped releasing with atomic quantity updates
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { TRPCError } from '@trpc/server';
5	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
6	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
7	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
8	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
9	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
10	
11	export const stockOutRouter = createTRPCRouter({
12	  list: tenantProcedure
13	    .input(
14	      z.object({
15	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
16	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
17	      }).strict(),
18	    )
19	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
20	      return withTenantContext(
21	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
22	        async () => {
23	          const where = { tenantId: ctx.tenantId };
24	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
25	            prisma.stockOut.findMany({
26	              where,
27	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
28	              take: input.limit,
29	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
30	              include: { items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true } } } } },
31	            }),
32	            prisma.stockOut.count({ where }),
33	          ]);
34	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
35	        },
36	      );
37	    }),
38	
39	  create: tenantProcedure
40	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.WAREHOUSE_STAFF))
41	    .input(
42	      z.object({
43	        releasedDate: z.string().datetime(),
44	        requestedByName: z.string().min(1).max(200),
45	        usedFor: z.string().min(1).max(500),
46	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
47	        items: z.array(
48	          z.object({
49	            productId: z.string().cuid(),
50	            quantity: z.number().int().min(1),
51	            sellingPriceSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
52	          }).strict(),
53	        ).min(1),
54	      }).strict(),
55	    )
56	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
57	      return withTenantContext(
58	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
59	        async () => {
60	          return prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
61	            // Generate slip number (SO-00001 format, per-tenant sequential)
62	            const lastOut = await tx.stockOut.findFirst({
63	              where: { tenantId: ctx.tenantId },
64	              orderBy: { printableSlipNumber: 'desc' },
65	              select: { printableSlipNumber: true },
66	            });
67	            const lastNum = lastOut !== null
68	              ? parseInt(lastOut.printableSlipNumber.replace('SO-', ''), 10)
69	              : 0;
70	            const slipNumber = `SO-${String(lastNum + 1).padStart(5, '0')}`;
71	
72	            // Validate sufficient stock for all items
73	            for (const item of input.items) {
74	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
75	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId: ctx.tenantId },
76	              });
77	              if (product.currentQuantity < item.quantity) {
78	                throw new TRPCError({
79	                  code: 'BAD_REQUEST',
80	                  message: `Insufficient stock for ${product.name}. Available: ${product.currentQuantity}`,
81	                });
82	              }
83	            }
84	
85	            const stockOut = await tx.stockOut.create({
86	              data: {
87	                tenantId: ctx.tenantId,
88	                referenceNumber: `SO-REF-${Date.now()}`,
89	                releasedDate: new Date(input.releasedDate),
90	                releasedByUserId: ctx.userId,
91	                requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
92	                usedFor: input.usedFor,
93	                notes: input.notes,
94	                printableSlipNumber: slipNumber,
95	                items: { create: input.items },
96	              },
97	              include: { items: true },
98	            });
99	
100	            // Decrement quantities and create movement logs
101	            for (const item of stockOut.items) {
102	              const product = await tx.product.findFirstOrThrow({
103	                where: { id: item.productId, tenantId: ctx.tenantId },
104	              });
105	
106	              await tx.product.update({
107	                where: { id: item.productId },
108	                data: { currentQuantity: { decrement: item.quantity } },
109	              });
110	
111	              await tx.stockMovementLog.create({
112	                data: {
113	                  tenantId: ctx.tenantId,
114	                  productId: item.productId,
115	                  movementType: 'stock_out',
116	                  referenceType: 'StockOut',
117	                  referenceId: stockOut.id,
118	                  quantityBefore: product.currentQuantity,
119	                  quantityDelta: -item.quantity,
120	                  quantityAfter: product.currentQuantity - item.quantity,
121	                  performedByUserId: ctx.userId,
122	                  requestedByName: input.requestedByName,
123	                  usedFor: input.usedFor,
124	                  performedAt: new Date(),
125	                },
126	              });
127	            }
128	
129	            return stockOut;
130	          });
131	        },
132	      );
133	    }),
134	});
135
```

```text
1	// Purchase order router — tenant-scoped CRUD + status management
2	
3	import { z } from 'zod';
4	import { createTRPCRouter, tenantProcedure } from '../trpc.js';
5	import { requireRole } from '../middleware/rbac.js';
6	import { UserRole } from '@inventorize/shared/enums';
7	import { prisma } from '@inventorize/db';
8	import { withTenantContext } from '@inventorize/db';
9	
10	export const purchaseOrderRouter = createTRPCRouter({
11	  list: tenantProcedure
12	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
13	    .input(
14	      z.object({
15	        page: z.number().int().min(1).default(1),
16	        limit: z.number().int().min(1).max(200).default(50),
17	        status: z.string().optional(),
18	      }).strict(),
19	    )
20	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
21	      return withTenantContext(
22	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
23	        async () => {
24	          const where = {
25	            tenantId: ctx.tenantId,
26	            ...(input.status !== undefined ? { status: input.status } : {}),
27	          };
28	          const [items, total] = await Promise.all([
29	            prisma.purchaseOrder.findMany({
30	              where,
31	              skip: (input.page - 1) * input.limit,
32	              take: input.limit,
33	              orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
34	              include: { supplier: { select: { name: true } }, items: true },
35	            }),
36	            prisma.purchaseOrder.count({ where }),
37	          ]);
38	          return { items, total, page: input.page, limit: input.limit, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / input.limit) };
39	        },
40	      );
41	    }),
42	
43	  byId: tenantProcedure
44	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
45	    .input(z.object({ id: z.string().cuid() }).strict())
46	    .query(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
47	      return withTenantContext(
48	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
49	        async () => {
50	          return prisma.purchaseOrder.findFirst({
51	            where: { id: input.id, tenantId: ctx.tenantId },
52	            include: {
53	              supplier: true,
54	              items: { include: { product: { select: { name: true, productCode: true } } } },
55	            },
56	          });
57	        },
58	      );
59	    }),
60	
61	  create: tenantProcedure
62	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
63	    .input(
64	      z.object({
65	        supplierId: z.string().cuid(),
66	        orderDate: z.string().datetime(),
67	        expectedDate: z.string().datetime().nullable().default(null),
68	        notes: z.string().max(2000).nullable().default(null),
69	        items: z.array(
70	          z.object({
71	            productId: z.string().cuid(),
72	            orderedQty: z.number().int().min(1),
73	            supplierCostSnapshot: z.number().min(0),
74	          }).strict(),
75	        ).min(1),
76	      }).strict(),
77	    )
78	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
79	      return withTenantContext(
80	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
81	        async () => {
82	          const { items, ...poData } = input;
83	          return prisma.purchaseOrder.create({
84	            data: {
85	              ...poData,
86	              tenantId: ctx.tenantId,
87	              poNumber: `PO-${Date.now()}`,
88	              status: 'draft',
89	              createdByUserId: ctx.userId,
90	              items: { create: items.map((item) => ({ ...item, receivedQty: 0 })) },
91	            },
92	            include: { items: true },
93	          });
94	        },
95	      );
96	    }),
97	
98	  updateStatus: tenantProcedure
99	    .use(requireRole(UserRole.ADMIN, UserRole.PURCHASING_STAFF))
100	    .input(
101	      z.object({
102	        id: z.string().cuid(),
103	        status: z.enum(['ordered', 'partially_received', 'received', 'cancelled']),
104	      }).strict(),
105	    )
106	    .mutation(async ({ ctx, input }) => {
107	      return withTenantContext(
108	        { tenantId: ctx.tenantId, userId: ctx.userId },
109	        async () => {
110	          return prisma.purchaseOrder.update({
111	            where: { id: input.id },
112	            data: { status: input.status },
113	          });
114	        },
115	      );
116	    }),
117	});
118
```

_**Agent - sidechain (2026-04-03 10:04:52Z)**_

Fix TypeScript errors in the Inventorize web app's Next.js page components. All files are under `/home/me/UbuntuDevFiles/1_COMPANY_DEV/CompanyApps/Inventorize/apps/web/src/app/`.

**Systematic issues to fix:**

1. **`useParams()` returns possibly null** — In Next.js 15, `useParams()` can return null. Fix: add null guard at top of component.

2. **`useSearchParams()` returns possibly null** — Same issue. Fix: null guard.

3. **Enum case mismatch** — Pages compare against UPPERCASE values like `'STOCK_IN'`, `'ACTIVE'` but the actual Prisma enum values are lowercase: `'stock_in'`, `'active'`, `'suspended'`, `'trial'`.

4. **Relation properties not in inferred type** — Pages reference `.supplier`, `._count`, `.createdByUser`, `.approvedByUser`, `.items`, `.product`, `.performedByUser` which are `include`d in the tRPC router but don't appear in the inferred return type (due to Prisma $extends). Fix: simplify pages to only show fields that are in the base model type (IDs rather than nested objects), OR access through optional chaining and type-narrow.

**Files to fix:**

### `[tenantSlug]/products/page.tsx`
- `useParams()` possibly null → add null guard

### `[tenantSlug]/products/[id]/page.tsx`
- `useParams()` possibly null → add null guard

### `[tenantSlug]/products/[id]/history/page.tsx`
- `useParams()` possibly null → add null guard
- `log.movementType === 'STOCK_IN'` → change to `'stock_in'`
- `log.movementType === 'STOCK_OUT'` → change to `'stock_out'`
- `log.performedByUser?.name` → doesn't exist in type, use `log.performedByUserId` or remove column

### `[tenantSlug]/purchase-orders/page.tsx`
- `useParams()` possibly null → add null guard
- `po.supplier?.name` → doesn't exist in type, use `po.supplierId`
- `po.items?.length` → doesn't exist in type, remove column

### `[tenantSlug]/purchase-orders/[id]/page.tsx`
- `useParams()` possibly null → add null guard
- `data?.supplier?.name` → doesn't exist, show supplierId
- `data?.items?.map(...)` → doesn't exist, remove items table or show note

### `[tenantSlug]/adjustments/page.tsx`
- `adj.createdByUser?.name` → doesn't exist, use `adj.createdByUserId`
- `adj.approvedByUser?.name` → doesn't exist, use `adj.approvedByUserId ?? 'Pending'`
- `adj.items?.length` → doesn't exist, remove column

### `[tenantSlug]/reports/page.tsx`
- `log.product?.name` → doesn't exist, use `log.productId`
- `log.movementType === 'STOCK_IN'` → change to `'stock_in'`
- `log.movementType === 'STOCK_OUT'` → change to `'stock_out'`
- `log.performedByUser?.name` → doesn't exist, use `log.performedByUserId`

### `platform/tenants/page.tsx`
- `tenant.status === 'ACTIVE'` → change to `'active'`
- `tenant.status === 'SUSPENDED'` → change to `'suspended'`
- `tenant._count?.users` → doesn't exist in type, remove columns

### `login/page.tsx`
- `useSearchParams()` possibly null → add null guard

**Pattern for useParams null guard:**
```tsx
const params = useParams();
if (params === null) return null;
const tenantSlug = params.tenantSlug as string;
```

Or simpler: `const params = useParams()!;` — but safer to use the guard pattern.

Actually the cleanest pattern for `useParams` in Next.js 15 with `exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true` is:
```tsx
const params = useParams<{ tenantSlug: string }>();
```
But `useParams` might still return null. So use:
```tsx
const params = useParams();
const tenantSlug = params?.tenantSlug as string | undefined;
if (tenantSlug === undefined) return null;
```

For the missing relation fields — the simplest approach that avoids type errors is to replace them with the ID fields that DO exist on the base model, or remove those columns. For example, instead of showing `po.supplier?.name`, show the supplier ID or just remove that column.

Please read each file and make the fixes. Be thorough — fix ALL issues in each file.

```text
1	// Products list page — searchable, filterable product catalog
2	
3	'use client';
4	
5	import { useState } from 'react';
6	import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';
7	import Link from 'next/link';
8	import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
9	
10	export default function ProductsPage() {
11	  const params = useParams<{ tenantSlug: string }>();
12	  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
13	  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
14	
15	  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.product.list.useQuery({
16	    page,
17	    limit: 50,
18	    search: search.length > 0 ? search : undefined,
19	  });
20	
21	  return (
22	    <div className="space-y-6">
23	      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
24	        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Products</h1>
25	      </div>
26	
27	      <input
28	        type="text"
29	        placeholder="Search by name, code, or barcode..."
30	        value={search}
31	        onChange={(e) => { setSearch(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
32	        className="flex h-10 w-full max-w-sm rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring"
33	      />
34	
35	      {isLoading ? (
36	        <div>Loading products...</div>
37	      ) : (
38	        <>
39	          <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
40	            <table className="w-full text-sm">
41	              <thead>
42	                <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
43	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Code</th>
44	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Name</th>
45	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Category</th>
46	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Quantity</th>
47	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Price</th>
48	                  <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Status</th>
49	                </tr>
50	              </thead>
51	              <tbody>
52	                {data?.items.map((product) => (
53	                  <tr key={product.id} className="border-b border-border">
54	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">
55	                      <Link href={`/${params.tenantSlug}/products/${product.id}`} className="text-primary underline">
56	                        {product.productCode}
57	                      </Link>
58	                    </td>
59	                    <td className="px-4 py-3">{product.name}</td>
60	                    <td className="px-4 py-3">{product.category}</td>
61	                    <td className={`px-4 py-3 text-right ${
62	                      product.currentQuantity <= product.lowStockThreshold ? 'text-destructive font-medium' : ''
63	                    }`}>
64	                      {product.currentQuantity} {product.unit}
65	                    </td>
66	                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
67	                      {'sellingPrice' in product ? `$${Number(product.sellingPrice).toFixed(2)}` : '-'}
68	                    </td>
69	                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
70	                      <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
71	                        product.isActive ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800'
72	                      }`}>
73	                        {product.isActive ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
74	                      </span>
75	                    </td>
76	                  </tr>
77	                ))}
78	              </tbody>
79	            </table>
80	          </div>
81	
82	          {data !== undefined && data.totalPages > 1 && (
83	            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
84	              <button
85	                onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.max(1, p - 1))}
86	                disabled={page === 1}
87	                className="rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-1 text-sm disabled:opacity-50"
88	              >
89	                Previous
90	              </button>
91	              <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
92	                Page {data.page} of {data.totalPages}
93	              </span>
94	              <button
95	                onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.min(data.totalPages, p + 1))}
96	                disabled={page === data.totalPages}
97	                className="rounded-md border border-border px-3 py-1 text-sm disabled:opacity-50"
98	              >
99	                Next
100	              </button>
101	            </div>
102	          )}
103	        </>
104	      )}
105	    </div>
106	  );
107	}
108
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
3	'use client';

5	import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
6	import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';
7	import Link from 'next/link';

9	export default function ProductDetailPage() {
10	  const params = useParams<{ tenantSlug: string; id: string }>();
11	  const { data: product, isLoading } = trpc.product.byId.useQuery({ id: params.id });

14	    return <div className="p-4">Loading product...</div>;
15	  }
16	
17	  if (product === null || product === undefined) {
18	    return <div className="p-4">Product not found.</div>;
19	  }
20	
21	  return (
22	    <div className="space-y-6">
23	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
24	        <Link href={`/${params.tenantSlug}/products`} className="text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:underline">
25	          &larr; Back to Products
26	        </Link>
27	      </div>
28	
29	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">{product.name}</h1>
30	
31	      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3">
32	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
33	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Product Code</p>
34	          <p className="font-mono">{product.productCode}</p>
35	        </div>
36	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
37	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Barcode</p>
38	          <p className="font-mono">{product.barcodeValue}</p>
39	        </div>
40	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
41	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Category</p>
42	          <p>{product.category}</p>
43	        </div>
44	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
45	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Unit</p>
46	          <p>{product.unit}</p>
47	        </div>
48	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
49	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Current Quantity</p>
50	          <p className="text-xl font-bold">{product.currentQuantity}</p>
51	        </div>
52	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
53	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Low Stock Threshold</p>
54	          <p>{product.lowStockThreshold}</p>
55	        </div>
56	      </div>
57	
58	      <div className="mt-4">
59	        <Link
60	          href={`/${params.tenantSlug}/products/${product.id}/history`}
61	          className="text-sm text-primary underline"
62	        >
63	          View Movement History &rarr;
64	        </Link>
65	      </div>
66	    </div>
67	  );
68	}
```

```text
1	// Product movement history page — stock movements for a single product
2	
3	'use client';
4	
5	import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
6	import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';
7	import Link from 'next/link';
8	
9	export default function ProductHistoryPage() {
10	  const params = useParams<{ tenantSlug: string; id: string }>();
11	  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.report.stockMovements.useQuery({
12	    productId: params.id,
13	    page: 1,
14	    limit: 100,
15	  });
16	
17	  return (
18	    <div className="space-y-6">
19	      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
20	        <Link href={`/${params.tenantSlug}/products/${params.id}`} className="text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:underline">
21	          &larr; Back to Product
22	        </Link>
23	      </div>
24	
25	      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Movement History</h1>
26	
27	      {isLoading ? (
28	        <div>Loading history...</div>
29	      ) : (
30	        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
31	          <table className="w-full text-sm">
32	            <thead>
33	              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
34	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
35	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Type</th>
36	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Before</th>
37	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Change</th>
38	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">After</th>
39	                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">By</th>
40	              </tr>
41	            </thead>
42	            <tbody>
43	              {data?.items.map((log) => (
44	                <tr key={log.id} className="border-b border-border">
45	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(log.performedAt).toLocaleString()}</td>
46	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
47	                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
48	                      log.movementType === 'STOCK_IN' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
49	                      log.movementType === 'STOCK_OUT' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
50	                      'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
51	                    }`}>
52	                      {log.movementType}
53	                    </span>
54	                  </td>
55	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">{log.quantityBefore}</td>
56	                  <td className={`px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium ${
57	                    log.quantityDelta > 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'
58	                  }`}>
59	                    {log.quantityDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}{log.quantityDelta}
60	                  </td>
61	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">{log.quantityAfter}</td>
62	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{log.performedByUser?.name ?? '-'}</td>
63	                </tr>
64	              ))}
65	            </tbody>
66	          </table>
67	        </div>
68	      )}
69	    </div>
70	  );
71	}
72
```

```text
35	              {movements?.items.map((log) => (
36	                <tr key={log.id} className="border-b border-border">
37	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(log.performedAt).toLocaleString()}</td>
38	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{log.product?.name ?? '-'}</td>
39	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
40	                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
41	                      log.movementType === 'STOCK_IN' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
42	                      log.movementType === 'STOCK_OUT' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
43	                      'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
44	                    }`}>
45	                      {log.movementType}
46	                    </span>
47	                  </td>
48	                  <td className={`px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium ${
49	                    log.quantityDelta > 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'
50	                  }`}>
51	                    {log.quantityDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}{log.quantityDelta}
52	                  </td>
53	                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">{log.quantityAfter}</td>
54	                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{log.performedByUser?.name ?? '-'}</td>
55	                </tr>
56	              ))}
57	            </tbody>
58	          </table>
59	        </div>
60	      )}
61	    </div>
62	  );
63	}
64
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	// Login page — credentials-based authentication
2	
3	'use client';
4	
5	import { useState } from 'react';
6	import { signIn } from 'next-auth/react';
7	import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation';
8	
9	export default function LoginPage() {
10	  const router = useRouter();
11	  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
12	  const callbackUrl = searchParams.get('callbackUrl');
13	  const [email, setEmail] = useState('');
14	  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
15	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
16	  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);
17	
18	  async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
19	    e.preventDefault();
20	    setIsLoading(true);
21	    setError(null);
22	
23	    const result = await signIn('credentials', {
24	      email,
25	      password,
26	      redirect: false,
27	    });
28	
29	    setIsLoading(false);
30	
31	    if (result?.error !== undefined && result.error !== null) {
32	      setError('Invalid credentials.');
33	      return;
34	    }
35	
36	    // Redirect to callback URL or dashboard
37	    router.push(callbackUrl ?? '/');
38	    router.refresh();
39	  }
40	
41	  return (
42	    <div className="flex min-h-screen items-center justify-center bg-background">
43	      <div className="w-full max-w-sm space-y-6 rounded-lg border border-border p-8 shadow-sm">
44	        <div className="space-y-2 text-center">
45	          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Inventorize</h1>
46	          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Sign in to your account</p>
47	        </div>
48	
49	        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
50	          {error !== null && (
51	            <div className="rounded-md bg-destructive/10 p-3 text-sm text-destructive">
52	              {error}
53	            </div>
54	          )}
55	
56	          <div className="space-y-2">
57	            <label htmlFor="email" className="text-sm font-medium">
58	              Email
59	            </label>
60	            <input
61	              id="email"
62	              type="email"
63	              value={email}
64	              onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
65	              required
66	              className="flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
67	              placeholder="you@example.com"
68	            />
69	          </div>
70	
71	          <div className="space-y-2">
72	            <label htmlFor="password" className="text-sm font-medium">
73	              Password
74	            </label>
75	            <input
76	              id="password"
77	              type="password"
78	              value={password}
79	              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
80	              required
81	              className="flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2"
82	              placeholder="Enter your password"
83	            />
84	          </div>
85	
86	          <button
87	            type="submit"
88	            disabled={isLoading}
89	            className="inline-flex h-10 w-full items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-primary-foreground ring-offset-background transition-colors hover:bg-primary/90 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50"
90	          >
91	            {isLoading ? 'Signing in...' : 'Sign in'}
92	          </button>
93	        </form>
94	      </div>
95	    </div>
96	  );
97	}
```

```tsx
// Purchase orders list page

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';

export default function PurchaseOrdersPage() {
  const params = useParams();
  const tenantSlug = params?.tenantSlug as string | undefined;
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);

  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.purchaseOrder.list.useQuery({ page, limit: 50 });

  if (tenantSlug === undefined) return null;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Purchase Orders</h1>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading purchase orders...</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">PO Number</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Supplier ID</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Status</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {data?.items.map((po) => (
                <tr key={po.id} className="border-b border-border">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">
                    <Link href={`/${tenantSlug}/purchase-orders/${po.id}`} className="text-primary underline">
                      {po.poNumber}
                    </Link>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{po.supplierId}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(po.orderDate).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                      po.status === 'received' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
                      po.status === 'cancelled' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
                      po.status === 'ordered' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' :
                      'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                    }`}>
                      {po.status}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
// Purchase order detail page

'use client';

import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function PurchaseOrderDetailPage() {
  const params = useParams();
  const tenantSlug = params?.tenantSlug as string | undefined;
  const id = params?.id as string | undefined;
  const { data: po, isLoading } = trpc.purchaseOrder.byId.useQuery(
    { id: id ?? '' },
    { enabled: id !== undefined },
  );

  if (tenantSlug === undefined || id === undefined) return null;

  if (isLoading) {
    return <div className="p-4">Loading purchase order...</div>;
  }

  if (po === null || po === undefined) {
    return <div className="p-4">Purchase order not found.</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <Link href={`/${tenantSlug}/purchase-orders`} className="text-sm text-muted-foreground hover:underline">
        &larr; Back to Purchase Orders
      </Link>

      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">{po.poNumber}</h1>
        <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-sm font-medium ${
          po.status === 'received' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
          po.status === 'cancelled' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
          'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
        }`}>
          {po.status}
        </span>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Supplier ID</p>
          <p className="font-mono text-sm">{po.supplierId}</p>
        </div>
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border p-4">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">Order Date</p>
          <p>{new Date(po.orderDate).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        Item details are available via the API. Use the purchase order ID to query individual line items.
      </p>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
// Stock adjustments list page

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';

export default function AdjustmentsPage() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.stockAdjustment.list.useQuery({ page, limit: 50 });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Stock Adjustments</h1>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading adjustments...</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Reason</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Created By</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Approved By</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {data?.items.map((adj) => (
                <tr key={adj.id} className="border-b border-border">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(adj.adjustmentDate).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">{adj.reason}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{adj.createdByUserId}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{adj.approvedByUserId ?? 'Pending'}</td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
// Reports page — low stock alerts and movement history

'use client';

import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';

export default function ReportsPage() {
  const { data: movements, isLoading } = trpc.report.stockMovements.useQuery({
    page: 1,
    limit: 50,
  });

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Reports</h1>

      <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Recent Stock Movements</h2>

      {isLoading ? (
        <div>Loading reports...</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Date</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Product ID</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Type</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">Change</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium">After</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">By</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {movements?.items.map((log) => (
                <tr key={log.id} className="border-b border-border">
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-xs">{new Date(log.performedAt).toLocaleString()}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{log.productId}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3">
                    <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                      log.movementType === 'stock_in' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
                      log.movementType === 'stock_out' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
                      'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                    }`}>
                      {log.movementType}
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  <td className={`px-4 py-3 text-right font-medium ${
                    log.quantityDelta > 0 ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'
                  }`}>
                    {log.quantityDelta > 0 ? '+' : ''}{log.quantityDelta}
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">{log.quantityAfter}</td>
                  <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{log.performedByUserId}</td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
// Platform tenants page — list and manage all tenants

'use client';

import { trpc } from '@/lib/trpc.js';

export default function PlatformTenantsPage() {
  const { data, isLoading } = trpc.platform.listTenants.useQuery({ page: 1, limit: 50 });

  if (isLoading) {
    return <div className="p-4">Loading tenants...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Tenants</h1>
      <div className="rounded-lg border border-border">
        <table className="w-full text-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-border bg-muted/50">
              <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Name</th>
              <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Slug</th>
              <th className="px-4 py-3 text-left font-medium">Status</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {data?.items.map((tenant) => (
              <tr key={tenant.id} className="border-b border-border">
                <td className="px-4 py-3">{tenant.name}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-3 font-mono text-xs">{tenant.slug}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-3">
                  <span className={`inline-block rounded-full px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium ${
                    tenant.status === 'active' ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' :
                    tenant.status === 'suspended' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' :
                    'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800'
                  }`}>
                    {tenant.status}
                  </span>
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```
